description: Étrange von Rosenburg is falsely accused of assassinating the king and is executed. Waking up in hell with no sweets in sight, she decides she'll just have to take the whole place over! Experience this frenetic action RPG from creator Sohei Niikawa, featuring a unique revolving lane mechanic that sends items, buffs, and even characters circling around the map! Enjoy the gorgeous character designs by legendary illustrator Shinichiro Otsuka as Étrange and her allies ride, fight, and even sing their way across hell. The action-packed gameplay can even be enjoyed by up to 4 players in a high-octane multiplayer mode!
